purpose: Two-layer ω-cycle closing the F14 NEXUS Absorb stage gap for atlas.n6: (1) flip nexus hexa-sim omega-ingest default from dry-run-style to absorb mode (F19), (2) wire kick_dispatch witness writeback to auto-fire omega-ingest --witness <new> in same process so atlas.n6 absorbs immediately without manual step (F20). Closes the second half of the Blowup→Contract→Emerge→Absorb loop (the first half — noise_sources/absorbed/ — was closed by F18 in the carry-forward cycle).

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: backward-compat
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: existing --absorb and --dry-run invocations preserve old behavior verbatim; no external callers broken by Layer 2 default flip
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: caller audit grep across tool/, cli/, bin/, scripts/, state/blockers/ surfaced 0 actual invocations besides cli/run.hexa dispatch wire; remaining hits are comments (atlas_omega_supercycle.hexa documents subprocess-invoke compatibility but does NOT call), tool internal references, and atlas_omega_glob_since.sh which is a glob wrapper that does not exec the tool. Smoke test --absorb explicit on already-absorbed witness → SKIP idempotent (compat preserved). --dry-run --witness <novel> → no atlas write (opt-out preserved).

idempotence_finding: omega_cycle_atlas_ingest absorb mode is NOT built-in idempotent — lines 777-786 (pre-edit) check if any fact id is already in main atlas.n6 via grep '^@[PCFLRSX] <id> =' and exits 3 'absorb conflict' on ANY hit. Re-running broadly would fail-loud after the first absorb. This forced Option A (single-witness scope via new --witness flag) PLUS a new idempotence-skip branch: when --witness is given AND ALL facts are already in atlas.n6 (conflicts == len(facts)), emit __OMEGA_CYCLE_ATLAS_INGEST__ SKIP cycle=<slug> reason=already-absorbed and treat as PASS instead of exit 3. This makes per-witness re-runs safe while preserving the original conflict-detect for batch/broader-scope runs (where mixed already-absorbed + novel facts indicate a real schema clash worth surfacing).

option_choice.choice: Option A (single-witness scope via new --witness <abs_path> flag)
option_choice.rationale: Option B (broad re-ingest with idempotence) would exit 3 absorb-conflict on every kick after the first because the underlying tool's absorb-conflict gate fires on ANY id already in main atlas.n6. Option A scopes the call to one new witness (cheap — single shard emit + 1 atlas merge per kick) and pairs with a new idempotence-skip path (PASS when all facts already absorbed) to make re-runs safe.
